channel.title: Tech Blog
channel.description: Cutting-edge insights into technology, AI, and development

item.title: 5 AI Tools Powering Self-Taught Developers
item.description: 7 AI coding tools empowering non-traditional developers to ship production-ready software. Detailed pros/cons, costs, and real-world results included.

item.title: Edge functions: the real cost and when they’re worth it
item.description: ate was 0.02% while Cloudflare’s was 0.008% with Edge functions cost they — scale to 100k requests per second during Black Frid.

item.title: Freelance rates: 2026 cheat sheet
item.description: Freelance developer rates 2026 cheat sheet — realistic numbers, real mistakes, and a step-by-step model to set your rate without guessing. Includes costs, market data, and a first-person breakdown of what went wrong.

item.title: Overbuilt stacks waste 40% of dev time
item.description: Cut API latency from 223 ms to 8 ms and AWS costs from $18k to $7.6k by replacing Kafka Streams and Redis cluster with a Node.js pipeline and single Redis instance — the real numbers and trade-offs.

item.title: Rate limiters that don’t break clients
item.description: Cut API 429s 99 % with a sliding-window limiter in Redis 7.2 — Lua scripts, connection pooling, and the retry header most teams miss. 3 concrete numbers included.

item.title: Monolith vs Microservices: the 2026 reset
item.description: Cut infra cost 60% and on-call pages to zero by choosing the right pattern in 2026 — modular monolith beats microservices unless you hit 500 req/minute on payments.

item.title: Choose the right real-time tool
item.description: Cut real-time latency 85% with WebSockets vs SSE vs long polling — exact benchmarks, code snippets, and the one setting every team misses first

item.title: Message queues: the 6-second trap most teams miss
item.description: Cut API latency 60% with Redis Streams queues — real benchmarks, poison message traps, and the 6-second trap most teams miss.

item.title: Burnout hacked: 7 freelance developer fixes
item.description: Cut freelance burnout 70% in 6 months with 3 concrete metrics — sleep hours, billable hours, and client satisfaction — and the exact tools that worked in 2026.

item.title: MCP servers: why they broke my AI pipeline
item.description: ound that 68% hit production incidents with with MCP servers they broke — a production pipeline in Q2 2026, the reality was d.

item.title: Hire me or ignore my GitHub
item.description: Build a portfolio that actually gets you hired remotely from Africa — case studies with metrics, Terraform modules, and the exact GitHub structure that landed $135k offers.

item.title: Zero-Trust for Tiny Teams: What Actually Matters
item.description: Cut security overhead 80% for small teams — MFA on admin tools, auto-rotated secrets, and TLS everywhere beat full zero-trust stacks 9 out of 10 times.

item.title: 38% salary boost with PyTorch in 2026
item.description: PyTorch 2.4 earns 38% higher salaries than TensorFlow 2.16 in 2026 — latency, cost, and tooling data that proves it. Learn which framework actually moves the paycheck needle.

item.title: 5G Backends: 4 Cellular Gotchas
item.description: Build backends 5G things: ops below 20%. Your background sync or conn. Practical guide with real examples.

item.title: Learn your codebase with AI: the missing context trap
item.description: Cut AI refactor time 60% by fixing the missing context trap — Copilot, Cursor, and OpenTelemetry trace indexing in 2026 with concrete numbers and quick checks.

item.title: Bypass TypeScript strict mode gaps
item.description: Cut runtime errors 80% with Zod 3.23 — the validation trap that slips past TypeScript strict mode and how to close it in 2026.

item.title: Which dev platform pays African devs best in 2026
item.description: Choose the platform that actually pays African devs in 2026 — latency, payouts, and acceptance rates from 5,000 real requests. Andela vs Toptal vs Arc with exact numbers.

item.title: Skip the CS degree, not the work
item.description: Cut 23% cloud costs and slash API latency from 4.2s to 85ms by pairing Redis 7.2 with Go 1.21 — the real path to senior developer in 2026 without a CS degree.

item.title: PostgreSQL vs MySQL in 2026: pick smarter
item.description: Pick PostgreSQL for 2026 projects — latency, storage cost, and replication benchmarks you can reproduce today.

item.title: Nairobi to $4K: Remote roles decoded
item.description: Land $4k/month remote roles with a GitHub profile fix — production proof, observability, and the exact stack developers in Nairobi and Lagos used in 2026
